news.title:
Anand Rathi's Jigar Patel recommends buying Engineers India, Prestige Estates, and Exide Industries for short-term gains.
Nifty 50 shows a strong 6% weekly rally, but West Asia tensions and high crude prices pose risks.
news.summary:

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd declared a second interim dividend of ₹1.5/share for FY 2025-26.
The record date is 6th March 2026, with payment by 20th March 2026 or within 30 days.
news.summary:
Engineers India Ltd declared a second interim dividend of ₹1.5/share for FY 2025-26.
The record date is 6th March 2026, with payment by 20th March 2026 or within 30 days.

news.title:
Oil PSUs utilized 81% of FY26 capex by January, per oil ministry data.
Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.
news.summary:

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd held an earnings call on 13th February 2026 post Q3 results.
Audio recording of the meeting is available on the company's website for investors.
news.summary:

news.title:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.
news.summary:
Coal India & Biocon reported mixed results; Coal India's profit beat estimates while Biocon's net profit rose YoY despite missing estimates.
IRCTC, Indian Hotels, and Engineers India posted strong revenue/profit growth, while Schneider Electric & Petronet LNG showed steady performance.

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd's Q3 FY25 turnover reached INR 12,516 Mn; PAT at INR 3,017 Mn.
Consultancy turnover was INR 4,735 Mn; turnkey at INR 7,201 Mn with 9M PAT of INR 4,867 Mn.
news.summary:
Engineers India Ltd's Q3 FY25 turnover reached INR 12,516 Mn; PAT at INR 3,017 Mn.
Consultancy turnover was INR 4,735 Mn; turnkey at INR 7,201 Mn with 9M PAT of INR 4,867 Mn.

news.title:
Engineers India Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹3.5B from ₹978M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 29.1% from 12.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Engineers India Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹3.5B from ₹978M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 29.1% from 12.8% YoY.

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd (EIL) is in talks with Guyana to develop its first oil refinery, offering PMC services.
The refinery, estimated at ₹7,000 crore, aims to enhance energy ties, leveraging EIL's global refinery expertise.
news.summary:
Engineers India Ltd (EIL) is in talks with Guyana to develop its first oil refinery, offering PMC services.
The refinery, estimated at ₹7,000 crore, aims to enhance energy ties, leveraging EIL's global refinery expertise.

news.title:
Engineers India to aid Dangote's refinery expansion, doubling capacity to 1.4M barrels/day.
This marks a significant development for Dangote's refinery facility.
news.summary:

news.title:
EIL partners with Dangote for $350M expansion of Africa's largest refinery, boosting capacity to 1.4M barrels/day.

news.title:
Indian firms like ONGC Videsh, IOC, and Reliance face geopolitical risks due to Venezuela turmoil, impacting oil projects and investments.
Pharma firms like Sun Pharma, Glenmark, and Cipla, along with Jindal Steel's mining ties, face operational and financial uncertainties.
news.summary:

news.title:
Duncan Engineering Ltd is now an approved vendor for Engineers India Ltd, enabling tender participation.
Duncan Engineering's stock traded at Rs. 465.00, with a net turnover of Rs. 10.2K on December 24, 2025.

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd secures a multi-million-dollar contract from Dangote Group for a petrochemical complex in Nigeria.
The project includes the world's largest urea plant, to be completed within three years.
news.summary:
Engineers India Ltd secures a multi-million-dollar contract from Dangote Group for a petrochemical complex in Nigeria.

news.title:

This collaboration aims to significantly enhance oil production capabilities.

news.title:
Engineers India Ltd board to meet on 28 Nov 2025 to consider interim dividend FY 2025-26.
Record date set for 4 Dec 2025; trading window closed 21-30 Nov 2025 per insider trading norms.
